entity.summary: Philippines-based centralized digital-asset platform launched in January 2014, combining peso-denominated exchange services with wallet and payment functions.
entity.notes: Official materials place the launch in January 2014. Current official and independent profiles confirm the continuing Philippines-based exchange service.

expected.summary: Philippines-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Coins.ph brand.

changes.summary: Philippines-based centralized digital-asset platform launched in January 2014, combining peso-denominated exchange services with wallet and payment functions.
changes.notes: Official materials place the launch in January 2014. Current official and independent profiles confirm the continuing Philippines-based exchange service.

events.title: Coins.ph launched
events.description: Coins.ph launched in the Philippines in January 2014 as a cryptocurrency and exchange platform.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker based on the official about page.

events.title: Joffre Capital completed acquisition of Coins.ph
events.description: Coins.ph announced completion of its acquisition by Joffre Capital and a Wei Zhou-led consortium after receiving the required approvals.
events.counterparty_name: Joffre Capital and Wei Zhou-led consortium
events.notes: The ownership change did not interrupt the Coins.ph service or alter its active status.

evidence.title: About Coins.ph
evidence.notes: Official about page states that Coins.ph launched in 2014 and lists January 2014 as its founding month.

evidence.title: What is Coins.ph and how does it work?
evidence.notes: Official help-center article corroborates the 2014 launch and current exchange functionality.

evidence.title: Coins.ph official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Coins.ph identity and active service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Coins.ph
evidence.notes: Independent profile corroborates the Coins.ph identity, Philippines registration, and 2014 establishment year.

evidence.title: Coins.ph acquisition by Joffre Capital completed
evidence.notes: Official announcement records completion of the acquisition and required approvals.

evidence.title: Coins.ph officially bought by Joffre Capital
evidence.notes: Independent local report corroborates the completed acquisition and Wei Zhou's leadership role.
